consumer_hint: Node v167 rollback execution preflight contract
scope: restore dry-run operator package for target release, artifact digest, WAL/Snapshot compatibility, and CHECKJSON dry-run commands

restore_target.handoff_boundary: target release selection is review evidence only and does not switch traffic or execute restore

compatibility_confirmations.boundary: WAL compatibility is dry-run review evidence and cannot repair Java transaction state
Snapshot LOAD is not executed by this package and would replace the in-memory store if run manually
SETNXEX is inspected only through CHECKJSON and cannot create Java order authority

expected: CHECKJSON LOAD reports store_replace_from_snapshot without executing LOAD
CHECKJSON COMPACT reports wal_rewrite_when_enabled without executing COMPACT
CHECKJSON SETNXEX reports write risks without executing token claim
boundaries: does not run Java or Node
not connected to Java transaction chain
restore package cannot create Java order authority

warnings: Node v167 may consume this package only after Java v58 and mini-kv v67 are complete
artifact digests are operator-recorded placeholders in this sample and must be verified outside mini-kv before production use
restore dry-run evidence is not a restore executor
pause_conditions: needs Node to auto-start Java or mini-kv
needs mini-kv in Java transaction consistency chain
restore target or artifact digest is unclear
